Open this file in Markdown preview (`Ctrl+Shift+V`) to view all diagrams.

## Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;  
    A[User CLI/GUI] -->|Requests AI News| B[AiNewsModule];  
    B -->|Fetches news| C[User Output];  
    C -->|Displays news| A;  
    A -->|Requests| D[Calculator];  
    D -->|Calculates and fetches results| E[User Output];  
    E -->|Displays results| A;  
    A -->|Requests| F[CalendarModule];  
    F -->|Displays today's date| E;  
    A -->|Requests| G[AuthModule];  
    A -->|Runs Tests| H[Test];
```

## State Machine

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2  
    [*] --> ReadyForInput  
    ReadyForInput --> FetchingAIContent  
    FetchingAIContent --> DisplayingNews  
    DisplayingNews --> ReadyForInput  
    ReadyForInput --> Calculating  
    Calculating --> DisplayingResult  
    DisplayingResult --> ReadyForInput  
    ReadyForInput --> DisplayingDate  
    DisplayingDate --> ReadyForInput  
    ReadyForInput --> UserAuthentication  
    UserAuthentication --> ReadyForInput  
    ReadyForInput --> RunningTests  
    RunningTests --> ReadyForInput
```

## Class Diagram

```mermaid
classDiagram  
    class AiNewsModule {  
      +void fetch_news(query: str, count: int)  
      +void show_cli()  
      +void show_gui()  
    }  
    class Calculator {  
      +void calculate(op: str, a: float, b: float)  
      +void run_interactive()  
      +void run_gui()  
    }  
    class CalendarModule {  
      +void show_cli()  
      +void show_gui()  
    }  
    class AuthModule {  
      +void require_auth(gui: bool)  
    }  
    class Config {  
      +void get_approved_docs_path(filename: str)  
    }  
    class Test {  
      +void run_tests()  
    }
```

## Database Entity

```mermaid
erDiagram  
    USERS {  
      INTEGER id  
      TEXT username  
      TEXT password_hash  
      TEXT salt  
      TEXT created_at  
    }  
    SESSIONS {  
      INTEGER id  
      INTEGER user_id  
      TEXT token  
      TEXT created_at  
      TEXT expires_at  
    }  
    USERS ||--o{ SESSIONS : "has"
```
